lines: Kugeza gupfa, tuzakuyoboka: Kugeza gupf' ur' Umwami wacu. Duhagaritswe kw ibendera yawe ;Tuzahapfira tukwiringiye.
Kugeza gupfa, turwan' intambara; Ni kw ingabo z'Umwami zinesha; Kugeza
gupf' Umusaraba wawe N' Ibendera yac' abacunguwe.
Kubwawe, Yesu, ni byiza kubaho; Inzira yaw' iratworohera. Ni nde wakwanga
Kugeza gupfa, dutegekwe nawe. Ubw' uriho, tuzabaho natwe ! Wumviy' Imana,
ntiwanga no gupfa, Ndets' udupfira n'urupfu rubi.
Mukiz' uz' intege nke zacu rwose; tuzi ko twagwa mu nzira yacu, N' utaza
Umwuka waw' udushorer' iteka,Kand' imitima yac' iwumvire, Ngo tub' ubwoko
